title: Confirm first partner adoption + record outcome
context: The project's headline success metric is sheets used in real teaching by a named educator or org — not download counts. All tasks carry verifiedNeed:false until a partner confirms. Securing the first confirmed adoption closes the M3 milestone and triggers verifiedNeed:true on the relevant tasks. Evidence must be real (attestation, photo-of-use, or written confirmation) — not speculative. The outcome is recorded in the project's outcome ledger.
objective: Secure and record confirmation from at least one named educator or organization that they have used the handwriting-practice sheets with real learners, provide adoption evidence, and update the outcome ledger and affected task records.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one named educator/org provides confirmed use of sheets with real learners, with evidence (written attestation, photo-of-use, or equivalent).
Outcome ledger entry committed recording: partner name/org, date, script(s) used, template/variant used, approximate learner count (opt-in, not tracked), and evidence reference.
All tasks corresponding to the confirmed-adopted sheet set updated with verifiedNeed:true and requestor set to the confirmed partner.
Evidence document committed (or reference to external attestation committed) — no fabricated or speculative adoption counts.
resources: PLAN.md section 4 (Success metrics — adoption by named educator, partner-reported learner count)
PLAN.md section 8 (Definition of Shipped — handed to a named beneficiary)
fieldtest-013 (educator field-test as a path to confirmed adoption)
output: A committed outcome ledger entry with adoption evidence and affected task verifiedNeed/requestor updates — marking the first confirmed real-world use.
